articles.title: What next for Ben Stokes after shock international retirement?
articles.description: Ashes comeback, county grind with Durham, franchise circuit and coaching among options for former England captain

articles.title: Walter hails NZ's 'pure grit and determination' to get the job done
articles.description: The NZ head coach lauds the contributions of Latham, Blundell and his bowling attack that dug deep following injuries

articles.title: Brook: Test captaincy would be 'great honour', as focus turns to India T20I
articles.description: White-ball captain was given "100%" backing by Ben Stokes to take over the red-ball role

articles.title: Ngarava: 'I walked into this Test match thinking about making history'
articles.description: The left-arm quick captained Zimbabwe to their biggest Test win - by an innings and 85 runs against Bangladesh

articles.title: Mooney, spinners take Australia to eighth T20 World Cup final
articles.description: Chasing just 126, Mooney's unbeaten 61 off 36 balls eased Australia to victory against West Indies, with seven overs to spare

articles.title: 'A bit scary' - Matthews on Dottin's pre-match medical emergency
articles.description: Dottin had to be taken off the field by her team-mates after the anthems, but she returned to bat at No. 8

articles.title: No time to analyse for India, England as T20I series awaits
articles.description: While Sooryavanshi still waits for his T20I debut, England rested Archer and Tongue for the first T20I

articles.title: Regulatory approval for RCB sale complete
articles.description: The Competition Commission of India has approved the acquisition by Aditya Birla-led consortium, and the next step is for BCCI to ratify the process

articles.title: 'Not embarrassing, but depressing' - Iyer rues series loss against Ireland
articles.description: India captain acknowledged the tactical errors against Ireland while backing himself to lead the  response against England

articles.title: Unchanged Australia bowl against West Indies
articles.description: West Indies made one change to the side which lost to Ireland, replacing Ashwini Munisar with Karishma Ramharack

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: AUS W vs WI W Today's Match Highlights: Unmissable video recap, POTM, match analysis, stats and more
articles.description: Australia made light work of the West Indies in the first semi-final in the ongoing Women's T20 World Cup 2026.

articles.title: 'Ireland defeat wasn't embarrassing, it was depressing' - Shreyas Iyer backs India to bounce back against England
articles.description: India's T20I captain Shreyas Iyer admitted that Ireland outplayed his team in every department.

articles.title: [Watch] Sanju Samson meets fans in England ahead of 1st T20I, melts hearts with his kindness
articles.description: Sanju Samson shared a wholesome moment with his fans ahead of the first T20I against England, which will be held at the Riverside Ground in Chester-le-Street on Wednesday, July 1.

articles.title: 'India is definitely missing Hardik Pandya' - Wasim Jaffer shares views on young seam-bowling all-rounders in national team setup
articles.description: Wasim Jaffer believes that younger seam-bowling all-rounders in Indian cricket like Nitish Kumar Reddy and Suryansh Shedge don't possess the same skills with the ball as Hardik Pandya.

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer reveals mystery behind 'Second DOB', pays heartfelt tribute to doctors
articles.description: Iyer's tribute is part of an awareness campaign, recalling his recovery from a spleen injury sustained during the third ODI against Australia in Sydney in October 2025.

articles.title: 3 England players who can trouble India in the T20I series
articles.description: Here are three England players who can trouble India in the upcoming five-match T20I series.

articles.title: Taijul Islam overtakes Mitchell Starc to enter all-time top five for left-arm bowlers' Test five-wicket hauls
articles.description: His 7 for 138 in Harare also took him level with Shakib Al Hasan for the most Test five-wicket hauls by a Bangladesh bowler, reached in fewer innings than Shakib needed.

articles.title: England get warm-up match ahead of the 150th anniversary Test vs Australia
articles.description: The trip Down Under for the 150th anniversary will be England's second in four months, as they are already scheduled to travel for a white-ball tour comprising three ODIs and five T20I games.

articles.title: Hardik Pandya shifts to Bengaluru, makes BCCI's CoE his permanent training base
articles.description: The move is unique among India's centrally contracted players, who typically visit the COE only for injury rehab, fitness tests or national camps.

articles.title: 'India wouldn't want to change their top 3' - Cheteshwar Pujara comments on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's potential debut vs England
articles.description: Pujara has advised Sooryavanshi to stay grounded and focus on his game despite all the hype and external noise coming from outside of the team setup.
